title: Exit Waterfall Machine
description: An interactive cap table simulator and educational game. Learn why a large startup exit can leave founders and employees with absolutely nothing.

maker.name: 4weird Games
maker.bio: Inspired by Ron Wiener's article on Venture Mechanics. We build fun, interactive browser simulators to demystify complex startup topics.

instructions: Configure your startup's funding rounds, debt, and liquidation preferences in Sandbox mode, then adjust the Exit Slider to watch the cash flow down the waterfall. Play Scenario mode to solve real-world startup capital challenges!
